# JavaScript Overview

## Core Concepts

- Dynamically typed, interpreted language
- Prototype-based inheritance
- First-class functions
- Event-driven, non-blocking I/O

## Recommended Learning Path

1. Start with language basics (variables, types, operators)
2. Move to functions and scope
3. Then objects and prototypes
4. Async programming
5. Built-in objects and collections
6. Finally modules and tooling
